stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP files Figure 4.24.
Consider the following information and assume a driftdown procedure after an engine failure during the cruise phase. What is the flight time travelled, the ground distance covered and fuel burned during the driftdown?

Driftdown from pressure altitude: 37 000 ft
Driftdown to pressure altitude: 21 000 ft
Gross Mass at engine failure: 50 000 kg
OAT: ISA +20°C
Headwind: 50 kt
Bleed configuration: Eng and Wing anti-ice OFF
A/C: Auto (High)
